title: Abigail Spanberger gave Democrats’ response to Trump. But she didn’t have the stage to herself.
description: Democratic groups staging counterprogramming events offered a snapshot of a party divided over how best to approach the midterms.
content: Democratic groups staging counterprogramming events offered a snapshot of a party divided over how best to approach the midterms.
